story: Stanislaw meets his son Daniel in an abandoned cinema on the station to plead for sabotaging the megastructure via old mag-line couplings. He lays out the plan using a hand-drawn map. Daniel refuses, citing ordinary life and new work from the solar funnel. A week earlier, under orders from Justice HQ, Daniel searched Stan’s home, found the same diagram, and set a trap for this meeting. Stan, mourning what’s been buried, keeps talking. The belts thrum overhead as they argue in the blue gloom.
implausible_knowledge: A week earlier, under orders from Justice HQ, Daniel searched Stan’s home, found the same diagram, and set a trap for this meeting.
question: When the shutters grind open and officers pour in, what will Stanislaw most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Well prepared for this.Bolt for the old mag-line access and flee through service corridors.
answer_without_knowledge: Shocked and confused, stand still and submit to arrest rather than attempt escape.
